overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a smooth drive along a desert highway toward Night City. The camera travels past Joshua trees and billboards, passes under overhead highway signage, and reveals a sprawling futuristic skyline before continuing into the open desert landscape.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the desert highway toward the overhead sign gantry

entered.detail: tall weathered advertising billboard structure beside the highway
distinctive desert yucca tree with spiky branches
metal barrier with red and white striped pattern
large highway sign structure spanning across the road
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple cables

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit desert highway with sparse Joshua trees and dry brush lining the road. A large billboard stands on the left while the camera approaches an overhead highway sign gantry in the distance. Power lines run parallel on the right side of the empty asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass and curve revealing city skyline

events.description: passes directly under the overhead highway sign gantry
turns right to reveal the futuristic city skyline of Night City in the distance

agents.ego_description: navigating under the highway signs and turning right to approach the city skyline

entered.detail: red and black striped traffic barrels beside the road barrier
futuristic high-rise buildings and towers of Night City visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the large overhead highway sign gantry and immediately turns right, revealing a stunning view of the futuristic Night City skyline in the distance. Red traffic barrels line the right side of the road as the highway curves toward the urban center.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: driving along the curved highway with the city skyline prominently visible on the right

entered.detail: tall metal lattice electricity transmission tower
raised highway or monorail structure leading toward the city center

segments.scene_description: Driving along the sweeping highway curve, the Night City skyline dominates the right side of the frame with its gleaming glass towers. Power pylons line the left side of the road while an elevated highway structure becomes visible ahead, leading toward the urban center.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with mountain backdrop

events.description: city skyline moves out of view as the highway continues into the open desert

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway into the open desert landscape away from the city

entered.detail: mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the desert
large boulders and rocky outcrops scattered across the desert terrain

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves past the city vista, the skyline exits the frame and the scene opens up to expansive desert terrain with distant mountains on the horizon. The highway continues straight through the arid landscape, flanked by desert scrub and rock formations under the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit desert highway that transitions from a sparse wilderness to a glimpse of a futuristic metropolis before returning to the open arid plains. It begins on an empty stretch of asphalt lined with Joshua trees and power lines, moving steadily toward a large overhead highway sign gantry. As the camera passes under the gantry and curves to the right, the horizon opens up to reveal the gleaming glass towers of the Night City skyline framed by red traffic barrels. The scene then follows the sweeping bend of the road, with the urban center dominating the view alongside towering power pylons, before the highway leads toward an elevated structure. Finally, the city vista exits the frame as the camera straightens out, opening into an expansive desert landscape of rock formations and distant mountains under the bright midday sun.
